_meta.purpose: Ledger index for entity observation state. Written by the m_26_14-observed-assets transform; one doc per entity (real hostname or observed-<ip>@<collector> for IP-keyed devices). host.name MUST be keyword (not text) for the m_26_14-observed-enrich policy to match correctly. If this index already exists with dynamic text mapping, DELETE it and _stop/_reset/_start the observed-assets transform to rebuild with this template. Consult the transform _meta sync_caveat before resetting. The first_log field (min @timestamp, added to the transform in M8) drives per-entity empirical retention horizons in the scoring engine.
